A business man works in New York and Los Angeles. If he is in New York, each
day he has four options; to remain in New York, or to fly to Los Angeles by
either the 8:00 a.m., 1:00 p.m. or 6:00 p.m. flight. On the other hand if he is
in Los Angeles, he has only two options; to remain in Los Angeles, or to fly to
New York by the 8:00 a.m. flight. In a 100 day period he has to be in New York
both at the beginning of the first day of the period, and at the end of the
last day of the period. How many different possible itineraries does the
business man have for the 100 day period (for example if it was for a 2 day
period rather than a 100 day period, the answer would be 4)?
